forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,58 @@
+---
+assignees:
+- claude-code
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: d280
+title: Eliminate the ui.* command namespace — fold into app.* (no separate "ui" commands)
+---
+## What
+Decision (user): there should be **no `ui.*` command namespace**. Commands that manipulate the application's UI surface ARE app commands — the `ui.*` prefix is a needless second namespace that splits identical concerns across two plugins. Collapse `ui.*` into `app.*` (routing to the correct MCP server is orthogonal to the command id namespace).
+
+## Background
+Command namespaces today are split by source-YAML origin, not by domain. The `app-shell-commands` plugin owns `app.*`; the `ui-commands` plugin owns `ui.*`. They overlap on UI-surface toggles (e.g. `app.palette`/`app.command` vs `ui.palette.open` both route to the `ui_state` MCP server). See sibling card `01KTCRQ6KJ67FJWYEZFQ6J7R13` (palette consolidation) — that is one symptom of this same split.
+
+## Current `ui.*` inventory (`builtin/plugins/ui-commands/index.ts`)
+| Command | Backs onto (MCP server) | Proposed new id |
+|---|---|---|
+| `ui.inspect` | `ui_state` (Inspect) | `app.inspect` |
+| `ui.inspector.close` | `ui_state` | `app.inspector.close` |
+| `ui.inspector.close_all` | `ui_state` | `app.inspector.closeAll` |
+| `ui.inspector.set_width` | `ui_state` | `app.inspector.setWidth` |
+| `ui.palette.open` | `ui_state` | (folds into the single palette command from the palette card) |
+| `ui.palette.close` | `ui_state` | `app.palette.close` / `app.dismiss` |
+| `ui.mode.set` | `ui_state` (SetKeymapMode) | `app.mode.set` (or `settings.keymap.*`) |
+| `ui.entity.startRename` | `ui_state` (StartRename) | `app.entity.startRename` (or `perspective.rename`) |
+| `ui.setFocus` | **`focus`** server | `app.setFocus` (or `nav.setFocus` / a `focus.*` id) — NOT ui_state |
+| `window.new` | `window` server | already correct (`window.*`) — just lives in the wrong plugin; move to a window/file plugin |
+
+Note: the id namespace is independent of which MCP server backs the command. `ui.setFocus` must keep routing to the `focus` server and `window.new` to the `window` server regardless of the rename.
+
+## Scope / approach
+- Rename the `ui.*` ids to `app.*` (per table; confirm final names) and fold the `ui-commands` plugin registrations into `app-shell-commands` (or distribute to the domain plugin that matches the backing server: focus → a focus plugin, window.new → file/window plugin).
+- Keep each command's backing MCP-server call unchanged — this is a namespace/registration move, not a behavior change.
+- Update all references: keybinding tables, `menu:` placements, context-menu wiring, scope-claim lookups, and the command-service e2e tests that assert the registered id set.
+
+## Blast radius (must update together)
+- `builtin/plugins/ui-commands/index.ts` (+ its `context.ts`), `builtin/plugins/app-shell-commands/*`
+- Any frontend keymap / scope that references `ui.*` ids (e.g. `ui.inspect`, `ui.setFocus`, `ui.palette.open`)
+- `crates/swissarmyhammer-command-service/tests/integration/builtin_ui_commands_e2e.rs` and `builtin_app_shell_commands_e2e.rs` (assert the new id set)
+- Any Rust/registry references to the old ids (grep `ui\.` command ids repo-wide)
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+- [ ] No command id begins with `ui.` — all former `ui.*` commands are `app.*` (or the correct domain prefix) and register from the consolidated plugin(s).
+- [ ] Each migrated command still routes to the same MCP server it did before (ui_state / focus / window) — verified, not assumed.
+- [ ] `window.new` and `ui.setFocus` route to `window` / `focus` respectively (not lumped under the ui_state/app shell by accident).
+- [ ] All keybindings, menu placements, and context-menu entries resolve under the new ids (no dangling `ui.*` reference).
+
+## Tests
+- [ ] Update `builtin_ui_commands_e2e.rs` / `builtin_app_shell_commands_e2e.rs` to assert the renamed id set and that each routes to the expected server.
+- [ ] A guard test asserting NO registered command id starts with `ui.` (prevents regression).
+- [ ] Frontend keymap test: former `ui.*` shortcuts resolve under the new `app.*` ids.
+- [ ] Regression: tests fail before the rename, pass after.
+
+## Workflow
+- Use `/tdd` — write the failing id-set / no-`ui.`-prefix guard test first, then migrate.
+
+## Related
+- Palette consolidation: `01KTCRQ6KJ67FJWYEZFQ6J7R13` (the single palette command lands in `app.*` as part of this).
+- Deeper follow-up (NOT this card): dissolving the `ui_state` monolith and redistributing its state (window geometry → window service, active_view → views, drag → drag, etc.). Track separately if desired.
\ No newline at end of file
